raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.2":"Logical consistency is a central responsibility in improving the draft to ensure the chain of descriptions about the schedulers holds without contradictions.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization is central to optimizing the ordering and narrative flow of the paragraphs describing the strategies.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing as it forms the core of enhancing grammar, conciseness, and sentence-level flow in the draft.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central to identify and articulate any unstated assumptions or limitations in the method descriptions.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to temper strong assertions like 'simplest,' 'first,' and 'strongest' to prevent unsubstantiated claims.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to keep improvements focused on the provided content without introducing extraneous elements.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is central to ensure the described scheduling strategies do not inadvertently promote harmful applications in energy management.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are central to maintain clear attribution of the ideas and components in the scheduling architectures."}}

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is a central responsibility in improving the draft to ensure the chain of descriptions about the schedulers holds without contradictions.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization is central to optimizing the ordering and narrative flow of the paragraphs describing the strategies.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing as it forms the core of enhancing grammar, conciseness, and sentence-level flow in the draft.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central to identify and articulate any unstated assumptions or limitations in the method descriptions.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to temper strong assertions like 'simplest,' 'first,' and 'strongest' to prevent unsubstantiated claims.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to keep improvements focused on the provided content without introducing extraneous elements.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is central to ensure the described scheduling strategies do not inadvertently promote harmful applications in energy management.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are central to maintain clear attribution of the ideas and components in the scheduling architectures.
